title: KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
